title: Lethal Company Mobs
description: Creatures from Lethal Company added into Minecraft
body:
Have any suggestion? Want to report a bug? We have a Discord server! You can join and ask anything you want!

Welcome to Lethal Company Mobs! This is a very straight-forward mod. It adds the creatures from Lethal Company into Minecraft, simple as that. No items from the game, no mechanics, no spaceship... Only the mobs! This mod aims to be a small horror mod with not much into it other than the mobs from Lethal Company!

 

You can find all these mobs naturally around the world in literally any existing biome, but they're pretty rare to find. Most of the mobs this mod adds appear during night or in dark places, and they all have their own gimmicks aswell, that way they're similar enough to their actual game counterparts.

 

All of the mobs added by this mod come with custom in-game sounds.

 

There is an official resourcepack that makes the Hoarding Bug go YIPPIE! Click here to check it out.

 

List of the mobs and information about them

Bracken


(Modelled by DankSherk83)
HP: 30
ATK: 10

Drops: Nothing
Special information: It goes from walking fast to being slow. It goes in intervals of 15 seconds and 20 seconds. When you protect yourself with a shield, the Bracken becomes slower, giving you a chance at escaping. When it kills you, it plays the iconic neck snapping sound it has in the original game. It's immune to knockback. Can also spawn in the Nether.

 

Coil-Head



HP: 50
ATK: 9

Drops: Nothing
Special information: It goes in intervals of 15 seconds from being paralyzed to quickly moving around. When it becomes paralyzed, it plays a sound that will make you know that it's safe to be around it for a while. When you block it with a shield, it becomes paralyzed for some time, giving you a chance at surviving. It's immune to knockback.

 

Ghost Girl



(Original skin texture by Exsanguinat1on)

HP: 50
ATK: 10

Drops: Nothing
Special information: She glows in the dark. When you find her, she won't move around and will instead stare at you. When you hit her, she will disappear while giggling, but there's also a 40% chance for her to start attacking you instead of disappearing. If you don't interact with her, she will despawn after 3 minutes. She's immune to all kinds of damage except for direct player attacks. Can also spawn in the Nether.

 

Hoarding Bug



HP: 12
ATK: 4

Drops: Nothing
Special information: Can spawn during daytime. They break grass and flowers around them. They are naturally passive towards you, but if you attack one, it will get angry and start flying fast to attack you.

 

Jester



HP: 50
ATK: 10

Drops: Nothing (Only in closed form) / Bone (Only in open form)
Special information: It spawns with the box closed. When they find you, they will simply follow you around but won't hurt you. After 1 minute has passed, it will come out of its box and will start attacking you.

 

Snare Flea



HP: 12
ATK: 2

Drops: String
Special information: When it attacks you, it will attach itself to your face. If you sneak (pressing SHIFT) while having it on your face, it will simply come off. It only attaches itself to your face when its HP is at max.

 

Thumper



HP: 24
ATK: 6

Drops: Raw Beef
Special information: They are very fast and attack melee.

 

 Eyeless Dog



HP: 25
ATK: 10

Drops: Raw Porkchop
Special information: They attack whoever is around them that isn't sneaking (pressing shift). They're passive if the entities around them are sneaking. Can also spawn in the Nether.

 

Forest Keeper


HP: 50
ATK: 10

Drops: Nothing
Special information: Has huge knockback. When it hits while its HP is at max, it'll grab you. This creature is only found in foresty biomes.

 

Hygrodere



HP: 50
ATK: 6

Drops: Slime Ball
Special information: Moves very slowly and it's immune to knockback.

 

Nutcracker


(Modelled by DankSherk83)
HP: 30
ATK: 8

Drops: Iron Nugget
Special information: Attacks you ranged instead of mainly melee.

 

Bunker Spider


HP: 30
ATK: 9

Drops: Spider Eye
Special information: When attacked, they have a 40% chance of placing cobweb in your location.

 

Earth Leviathan



HP: 50
ATK: 10

Drops: Nothing
Special information: It spawns hidden underground. After 30 seconds have passed, the leviathan jumps out into the air and hurts you if you touch it.

 

Spore Lizard


HP: 50
ATK: 3

Drops: Gunpowder
Special information: When attacked, they attack players back. From time to time, they place purple smoke around. The smoke goes away after 7 seconds.

 

Baboon Hawk


HP: 36
ATK: 4

Drops: Feather
Special information: They attack whoever is around them that is running/sprinting. They're passive if the entities around them are walking or sneaking.

 

Old Bird


HP: 50
ATK: 9

Drops: Iron Ingot
Special information: Spawns unactive and in the span of 3 minutes it becomes active. When you hurt it or when it hurts you, it'll have a 40% chance of shooting a rocket at you. Rockets do a slight explosion upon contact and also have a 30% chance of setting you on fire for 7 seconds. When hurting Old Birds, they have a 20% chance of gaining Levitation III for 5 seconds. They are immune to falling damage, fire damage and explosions.

 

Butler


HP: 15
ATK: 5

Drops: Iron Nugget
Special information: They only attack you if you attack them first. When killed, they will spawn 7 Mask Hornets that will chase you to kill you.

 

Tulip Snake


HP: 6
ATK: 0

Drops: Red Tulip (Red form), Blue Orchid (Blue form), Dandelion (Yellow form)
Special information: Can spawn during daytime. They will chase you around and when they get to you, they will attach to you and make you fly up. It only attaches itself to you when its HP is at max.

 

Circuit Bees


HP: 2
ATK: 3

Drops: Nothing
Special information: They appear when breaking Circuit Beehives. These beehives can be found around the world in anywhere that has grass.

 

Manticoil


HP: 10
ATK: 0

Drops: Feather
Special information: Spawns during daytime. It's passive towards players. It's immune to falling damage. It usually tries to run away from players.

 

Masked


HP: 20
ATK: 11

Drops: Nothing
Special information: It's aggressive towards players and immune to potion effects. Can also spawn in the Nether.

 

Barber


HP: 50
ATK: 9

Drops: Clay Ball
Special information: They are invisible unless a player is at least 8 blocks near them. If the difficulty is set on easy mode, the distance is of at least 9 blocks. Can also spawn in the Nether.

 

Kidnapper Fox & Vain Shroud

(Modelled by DankSherk83)

HP: 25
ATK: 6

Drops: Leather
Special information: They spawn during daytime as Vain Shrouds and then become the Kidnapper Fox during night time. It doesn't turn back into a Vain Shroud when it becomes daytime again.

 

Maneater

 

HP: 10 (Baby) / 20 (Adult)
ATK: 0 (Baby) / 6 (Adult)

Drops: Nothing
Special information: They spawn during daytime. If you get too close to one, it'll consider you its parent. If it ever gets hurt, it will start to cry, and will become an adult after 11 seconds have passed if not healed in time. You can heal them by simply right-clicking them. If you are to attack one directly, it'll have a 40% chance of automatically becoming an adult.

 

Lasso

 

HP: 50
ATK: 1

Drops: Nothing
Special information: It only spawns in the Nether.

 

Giant Sapsucker

 

HP: 28
ATK: 6

Drops: Egg & Feather
Special information: It's naturally passive towards players. It will only become aggressive if the player is holding an Egg. It's also extremely fast and immune to falling damage. It will also attack you if you attack it first.
